verification_notes: 18 holes, par 72, 7,393 yards from black tees confirmed across multiple sources (golfasian.com, golflux.com, pattayagolf.net, golfpattaya.com). Founded 1958; renovated/redesigned late 1980s by Japan Golf Promotion Co. Ltd., later attributed to JMP Golf Design Group (same lineage). Green fees from pattayagolf.net (valid until 31 Oct 2026): 1,700 THB weekday / 2,500 THB weekend — these are green fee only; caddie 350 THB and cart 600 THB are separate itemised fees. 1golf.eu shows lower rates (900/1800 THB) that are likely older or agent-discounted. golfsavers.com shows 1,350/2,400 THB which may be a discount booking rate. govigolf.com shows higher all-in bundled rate of 2,900/3,200 THB (green fee + caddie + cart included). Using pattayagolf.net 1,700/2,500 THB as the published base green fee with separate caddie/cart as these are most recently confirmed. Provisional flag: multiple fee structures exist across booking platforms; the owner/direct rate may differ. Caddie compulsory confirmed by multiple sources (thailandgolfers.com, golfpattaya.com). Cart optional (paid at pro shop). GPS 13.2272930, 100.9622960 from golfpattaya.com. Distance from Bangkok ~90 km / ~90 min from golf-tours-thailand.com. priceRange: ฿฿ (weekday green fee + caddie = 2,050 THB; with optional cart 2,650 THB). Website bangpragolf.co.th confirmed from search results. Phone +66 38 341149 from egathailand.com / kolfers.com.
disputes: Fee structure: Multiple platforms show different rate structures. 1golf.eu: 900 THB weekday / 1,800 THB weekend (likely outdated or base discounted rate). golfsavers.com: 1,350 THB weekday / 2,400 THB weekend (likely booking platform discount). pattayagolf.net: 1,700 THB weekday / 2,500 THB weekend (valid until Oct 2026 — used as primary). govigolf.com: 2,900 THB weekday / 3,200 THB weekend (all-inclusive with caddie and cart). Using pattayagolf.net rate as the published green fee (caddie/cart itemised separately). Recommend verifying directly with the club.

Designer attribution: Some sources say 'Japan Golf Promotion Co. Ltd.', others say 'JMP Golf Design Group' — these appear to be the same entity at different points in time. Used 'Japan Golf Promotion Co. Ltd. / JMP Golf Design Group' with note on renovation.

designer.value: Japan Golf Promotion Co. Ltd. / JMP Golf Design Group

prose.overview: Bangpra International Golf Club is one of the oldest golf courses in the Eastern Seaboard, founded in 1958 as a collaborative venture between the Tourism Authority of Thailand and Japan Golf Promotion Co. Ltd. The course was substantially rebuilt in the late 1980s, and more recently redesigned by JMP Golf Design Group to its current championship configuration of 18 holes, par 72, stretching to 7,393 yards from the black tees. Set in a gently sloping forested valley between Si Racha and Pattaya in Chonburi Province, Bangpra combines mature parkland character — tall hardwood trees, bougainvillea, and tropical flora — with the technical demands of a long-measure layout. The course offers on-site accommodation, a Japanese restaurant, driving range, and spa facilities. It draws a consistent clientele of Japanese visitors (reflecting the course's long historical ties with Japanese golf), Pattaya expats, and Bangkok-based golfers making the 90-minute drive along the Eastern Seaboard freeway.
prose.layout_and_experience: The 18-hole layout plays through a wooded valley with natural elevation changes that create a varied and visually pleasing round. The parkland terrain is defined by mature trees lining the fairways — the course's age means the tree coverage is genuinely old-growth in character, not planted scenery. The front nine is regarded as the stronger half, featuring more pronounced elevation changes and scenic views over the valley. The back nine flattens somewhat but introduces elevated, circular-shaped greens that reward accurate approach play and punish those who miss on the wrong side. Signature holes include the par-3 second across water, the long par-4 third, and the par-3 twelfth — a 154-yard carry over a water hazard — which is frequently cited as the course's defining shot. All par-3s play from over 180 yards from the blue tees, placing consistent emphasis on club selection and ball-striking precision. The course plays 7,393 yards at full stretch and 6,964 yards from the blue tees — a meaningful test from either marker. Cart path only rules apply, reflecting the course's care for its fairway conditions.
prose.tips: Bangpra's green fee of 1,700 THB weekday and 2,500 THB weekend is a genuine green fee only — caddie (350 THB, compulsory) and cart (600 THB, optional) are charged separately at the pro shop. Budget accordingly for the true all-in cost of approximately 2,050–2,650 THB on a weekday. The course is 40 minutes north of central Pattaya and about 90 minutes from Bangkok — early starts are recommended to avoid midday heat and to complete the round before afternoon traffic builds on the Eastern Seaboard motorway. Spike-free shoes and golf attire are required. On-site accommodation makes Bangpra a viable overnight stop for golfers combining it with other Eastern Seaboard courses. November through February is the optimal season for conditions. The course is closed on Mondays.
prose.location_and_access: Bangpra International Golf Club is located at 45 Moo 6, Bangpra, Si Racha, Chonburi 20110 — approximately 90 km east of central Bangkok and 40 minutes north of downtown Pattaya. Access from Bangkok is via the Eastern Seaboard Motorway (Highway 7 / Route 34), exiting toward Si Racha and Bangpra. Drive time from Bangkok is approximately 90 minutes off-peak; allow 120 minutes during peak hours or public holidays. From Pattaya, the drive takes around 30–40 minutes. A private car or pre-arranged golf transfer is the practical transport option; no public transit serves the course.
prose.rental_cta_context: Heading to Bangpra International Golf Club from Bangkok? LENGOLF delivers TaylorMade and Callaway rental sets to your hotel — avoid checking clubs for the Eastern Seaboard trip.

en.title: Bangpra International Golf Club — Green Fees, Course Guide & Golf Club Rentals
en.meta_description: Bangpra International Golf Club Chonburi: green fees from 1,700 THB, 18-hole parkland course guide, caddie/cart info & club rentals for Bangkok golfers.
